subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the Prisoner unto him who hath turned towards the Countenance, that this remembrance may draw him nigh unto a station wherein he shall speak forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المسجون الی الذی توجه الی الوجه لیقربه الذکر الی مقام تنطق فیه
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @Word of God is its own standard, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
